goal: Import documents into the DC-Agent knowledge base while preserving document identity, chunk content, progress reporting, and failure details.

acceptance_criteria.description: Pre-chunked TXT and Markdown documents can be imported through the dashboard API.
Embedding or upload failures are reported per file without marking the whole task as crashed.
Sparse and vector retrieval dependencies remain covered by unit tests.
Pre-chunked imports preserve source_path metadata so later agent answers have a stable original-source citation basis.
Retrieval results and formatted agent context expose source_path so answers can cite original documents.
Agent prompt and KB query tool instructions require answers to cite source_path when knowledge-base content is used.
A fixture document can move through pre-chunked import, retrieval, formatted context, and citation instruction without losing source_path.
Formatted knowledge-base context includes an Obsidian [[document]] wikilink derived from source_path.
